arg.name: use_rviz
arg.description: Whether to launch RViz or not.

arg.name: use_xacro
arg.description: Whether to use xacro to process the URDF file.

arg.name: robot_state_publisher_frequency
arg.description: The frequency (in Hz) for the robot_state_publisher to publish transforms.

arg.name: joint_state_publisher_frequency
arg.description: The frequency (in Hz) for the joint_state_publisher to publish joint states.

arg.name: robot_urdf_xacro
arg.description: The URDF Xacro file for the robot

arg.name: robot_urdf
arg.description: The URDF file for the robot if not using xacro

arg.name: planning_tf_prefix
arg.description: Prefix for planning robot's TF frames

arg.name: base_x
arg.description: X position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_y
arg.description: Y position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_z
arg.description: Z position of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_roll
arg.description: Roll of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_pitch
arg.description: Pitch of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

arg.name: base_yaw
arg.description: Yaw of the robot's base frame relative to RViz fixed frame

node.name: fixed_to_base_broadcaster
node.args: $(var base_x) $(var base_y) $(var base_z) $(var base_roll) $(var base_pitch) $(var base_yaw) $(var rviz_fixed_frame) $(var base_frame)
